collectionPlanName.title: collectionPlanName
collectionPlanName.description: Name of the Collection Plan for which Payment extension is to be created

comments.title: comments
comments.description: Optional comments, populate if user provides. Don't explicitly ask

installments.title: installments
installments.description: This uses the PSIInputObject apex file and prompts the user to first provide the number of installments. Then prompt them to provide the values for fields of each PSIInputObject

promisedAmount.title: promisedAmount
promisedAmount.description: Total amount to be paid in the payment extension. This should equal sum of requested amounts in all installments

shouldIgnoreRecentPaymentExtnRequest.title: shouldIgnoreRecentPaymentExtnRequest
shouldIgnoreRecentPaymentExtnRequest.description: If user want to created a payment extension event though there is a recently created payment extension request, set it to true

verifiedCustomerContactId.title: verifiedCustomerContactId
verifiedCustomerContactId.description: The verified Contact Id, whose context is used to query records
